# Characters — Animalia

- ["Threadscar" Melissa](melissa-threadscar.md) — 42 human female named-veteran-tier contractor stratum / adventurer-contractor (caravan-escort, close protection, mercenary-band siege, bandit-hunter, extraction-escort auxiliary), Mudbrook-on-the-Bend
- [Vespera Nightwhisper](vespera-nightwhisper.md) — mid-twenties cat-folk itinerant contractor-stratum / bardic-circuit performer + hazard-labor adventurer, Mudbrook
